title: Lincoln County Deputy Arrested for Threats
summary: Michael Hargrave, a Lincoln County deputy, was arrested in Mecklenburg County for allegedly sending threats and cyberstalking.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential abuse of power and jurisdictional issues in law enforcement misconduct.

title: Cool Weather Followed by Warm-Up This Week
summary: The weather forecast predicts cooler temperatures tonight, followed by a warm-up later in the week, with rain chances on Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief overview of the upcoming weather conditions for the Charlotte area.

title: Huntersville Homicide Leads to CMPD Investigation
summary: A CMPD investigation at Atrium Health stemmed from a homicide that occurred in Huntersville.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates inter-jurisdictional cooperation in solving violent crimes.

title: CLT Airport to Add Fourth Runway
summary: Charlotte Douglas International Airport is adding a fourth runway with the help of UNC Charlotte researchers and new technology.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates ongoing infrastructure development and academic-industry partnerships.

title: I-85 North Cleared After Crash
summary: A crash on I-85 North near the Yadkin River bridge caused lane closures but has since been cleared.

title: Reward Offered for Fiber Optic Line Cut
summary: Spectrum is offering a $25,000 reward for information leading to the arrest of whoever cut a fiber optic line in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the vulnerability of critical infrastructure and the consequences of vandalism.

title: Man Dead in York Shooting; Suspect Arrested
summary: A man is dead after a shooting on West Liberty Street in York. A suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a fatal act of violence and the swift apprehension of a suspect.

title: SBI Investigates Inmate Death at Mecklenburg Jail
summary: The SBI is investigating the death of an inmate, Juan Utuy-Sarat, at the Mecklenburg County jail.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about inmate safety and conditions within correctional facilities.

title: Charges Expected in Deadly Iredell Crash
summary: Charges are expected in connection to a deadly crash in Iredell County, where speed is believed to be a factor.

title: Crash Closes I-485 Inner in Matthews
summary: A crash closed I-485 Inner in Matthews early Saturday morning, causing traffic delays.

title: Gaston County Teachers Rally for Higher Pay
summary: Teachers and supporters rallied in Gaston County for higher pay, highlighting financial challenges in education.

title: May Day March Calls for Worker Protections
summary: A May Day march in east Charlotte advocated for stronger worker protections and immigrant rights.

title: CMPD Chief Prioritizes Officer Wellness, Trust
summary: CMPD Chief Estella Patterson discusses crime trends, officer wellness, and community trust in a recent interview.

title: Fake Grenade Evacuates Caldwell Walmart
summary: A man with a fake grenade prompted an evacuation at a Walmart in Hudson, leading to a large police presence.

title: Charlotte Water Implements Water Restrictions
summary: Charlotte Water implements mandatory water restrictions due to worsening drought conditions in the Carolinas.
